questions.question: Register A starts at 15. After 1 blue ball, what value does register A show?
hints: Each blue ball decrements the register by 1

questions.question: After 4 blue balls, what is the value of register A?
After 10 blue balls, what is the value of register A?
Trace the state of each bit after each ball in a state trace table
hints: Top bit flips with every ball going right-to-left
2nd bit flips when top bit flips to right
Ramps are placed on left side to make it count down
